channel.title: MarketMax, Digital Marketing Blog
channel.description: Free digital marketing insights by Ketan Jawale.

item.title: RAG Explained: How AI Search Actually Works (And Why It Matters for SEO)
item.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) powers AI search engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. Understand how RAG works and how to optimize your content for it.

item.title: How to Optimize for AI Overviews in 2026 (Step-by-Step Guide)
item.description: Learn how to get your content featured in Google's AI Overviews. Proven strategies to increase visibility and citations in AI-generated search results.

item.title: What is Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)? The Complete Guide
item.description: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is the future of SEO. Learn what GEO is, how it works, and how to optimize your content for AI-powered search engines like ChatGPT and Perplexity.

item.title: Top 7 SEO Trends That Will Dominate 2026 (And How to Prepare)
item.description: SEO is evolving faster than ever. From AI Overviews to E-E-A-T and Core Web Vitals, here are the 7 SEO trends that matter most in 2026.

item.title: Building a Social Media Strategy That Actually Works in 2026
item.description: Stop posting into the void. Learn how to build a social media strategy that drives engagement, builds community, and grows your brand.

item.title: SEO for Beginners: The Complete Guide to Ranking Higher in 2026
item.description: A comprehensive, beginner-friendly guide to search engine optimization. Learn keyword research, on-page SEO, technical SEO, and link building.

item.title: How to Measure Content Marketing ROI (Without the Fluff)
item.description: Learn how to track, measure, and prove the ROI of your content marketing efforts with practical frameworks and free tools.

item.title: Google Ads on a Small Budget: 7 Tips to Maximize Every Dollar
item.description: Running Google Ads with a limited budget? These 7 practical tips will help you get more clicks, conversions, and ROI from every dollar.

item.title: Build a Free Marketing Analytics Dashboard in 30 Minutes
item.description: Stop guessing and start knowing. Learn how to build a free marketing analytics dashboard using Google Looker Studio.
